name: kyverno-policy-exception
description: Kyverno policy violation: create scoped PolicyException for approved workload
steps: Review the violated Kyverno policy: kubectl get clusterpolicy <policy-name> -o yaml
Validate the workload has been approved for exception by security team
Create PolicyException resource scoped to specific namespace and workload
Commit exception YAML to infrastructure/kyverno/exceptions/ in GitOps repo
ArgoCD auto-syncs the exception — verify: kubectl get policyexception -n <namespace>
Confirm deployment now passes admission: kubectl apply -f <workload.yaml> --dry-run=server
Document exception reason in exception annotation for audit trail
